description: AC-4/AC-5: unresolved duplicates pause check-in with billing and clinical documentation blocked; acquired-clinic duplicates route to the data-migration merge queue; post-hoc duplicates with activity route to the merge-review queue.

cases.name: AC-5: an unresolved duplicate pauses check-in — no billing, no clinical documentation, routed to merge review
AC-5: an acquired-clinic duplicate routes to the data-migration merge queue, never desk resolution
AC-4: a post-hoc duplicate with activity on both records routes to the merge-review queue
